{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Remnant eyes
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Remnant eyes]] allow a person to see brand-new colors.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
